channel.title: Multi-Tenancy on StageSet Controller
channel.description: Recent content in Multi-Tenancy on StageSet Controller

item.title: Security & multi-tenancy
item.description:
How to run StageSet without granting it broad cluster power, keep secrets encrypted, and constrain what it can reach. The controller applies as a tenant ServiceAccount, so a StageSet can do exactly what its RBAC allows and no more.

  • Secrets encryption — decrypt SOPS-encrypted files in memory during apply.
  • Multi-cluster and tenancy — apply as a tenant ServiceAccount or to a remote cluster.
  • Admission webhook — validate StageSets at admission time.
  • Network policy — lock the controller’s traffic down to what it needs.
  • Service mesh — run the controller inside a mesh.
